title: Oracle beats Q3 expectations on AI demand
description: The US group is benefiting from the boom in artificial intelligence to accelerate growth in its cloud services and top analysts' forecasts.
content: Oracle posted quarterly results that beat expectations, driven by strong demand for its artificial intelligence-related cloud computing services. In Q3, the company reported revenue of $17.19bn, topping the average analyst estimate of $16.91bn, accor... [683 chars]

title: Kollam BSF officer shoots himself dead while on duty
description: Santosh Kumar is survived by his wife, who works at the Thuruthikkara RTO office, and their children, Deva Priya and Deva Theerth..BSF officer suicide, Malayali BSF officer death, Santosh Kumar suicide, BSF duty Bengal, officer shoots self Bengal, soldier suicide India, mental health military, suicide prevention forces, artificial intelligence suicide detection, LLM mental health support, AI in military safety, large language models suicide prevention, AI officer well-being, military mental health awareness, BSF soldier tragically dies

title: Thinking Machines Lab and NVIDIA announce partnership to deploy at least 1GW of Vera Rubin AI systems
description: Thinking Machines Lab and NVIDIA have announced a multi-year strategic partnership to deploy at least one gigawatt of next-generation NVIDIA Vera Rubin systems to support frontier model training and platforms delivering customizable artificial intelligence at scale.
content: New Delhi [India], March 11 (ANI): Thinking Machines Lab and NVIDIA have announced a multi-year strategic partnership to deploy at least one gigawatt of next-generation NVIDIA Vera Rubin systems to support frontier model training and platforms delive... [2242 chars]

title: AI Doesn’t Need to Be a Climate Villain
description: Artificial intelligence can be an energy-hungry, slop-creating, bomb-targeting nightmare. But it can also be a powerful tool for good — in the right hands. For one, it has the potential to revolutionize what we know about companies’ climate risks and their impact on the environment. That’s increasingly rare and precious information at a time when policymakers are turning their back on compulsory disclosures.

title: Oracle, OpenAI Scrap Texas Data Center Expansion Plan, AI Stocks Decline
description: Introduction Oracle Corp. and OpenAI have abandoned plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence data center in Abilene, Texas, according to a Bloomberg News report published on March 6, 2026. Sources familiar with the matter said negotiations to scale the facility, known as the Stargate project, stalled over financing issues and OpenAI’s changing demand forecasts. […]

title: Infosys & Incora Partner To Deploy AI Platforms For Global Aerospace Supply Chain Operations
description: Infosys and aerospace supply chain solutions provider Incora have announced a multi-year strategic collaboration to advance artificial intelligence-driven supply chain operations. The partnership will deploy AI-enabled capabilities across Incora’s global network spanning more than 60 countries using Infosys Topaz and the EdgeVerve AI Next Platform.
content:
Fort Worth, Texas / Bengaluru: Infosys is expanding its role in enterprise AI transformation through a new alliance with Incora aimed at modernizing global aerospace and defense supply chain operations.
